findings: Hostname: CORE-RTR-01 | IP: 10.0.0.1 | Severity: High | Finding: Network: Cisco Discovery Protocol (CDP) enabled on external interfaces. | Description: External facing router broadcasts sensitive network topology data.

Hostname: WEB-PORTAL-02 | IP: 172.16.5.10 | Severity: Critical | Finding: Application: SQL Injection vulnerability on login portal. | Description: Unsanitized user input on the login form allows arbitrary database queries.

Hostname: DC-02 | IP: 192.168.1.16 | Severity: Critical | Finding: Active Directory: Default Domain Admin credentials in use. | Description: The built-in Administrator account is using a known default password.
Hostname: AWS-S3-PROD | IP: Cloud | Severity: High | Finding: Cloud: S3 bucket publicly readable. | Description: A production S3 bucket containing PII has public read access enabled.
Hostname: USER-LAPTOP-99 | IP: 10.10.50.22 | Severity: Medium | Finding: Endpoint: Endpoint missing EDR agent. | Description: A corporate laptop was deployed without CrowdStrike Falcon installed.
